title: 1.1: Tests that generate_filename produces a fallback value in place of the document type when {document_type} is in the format string and no document type is assigned
1.2: Tests that generate_filename substitutes the document type name for {document_type} when a document type is assigned
1.3: Tests that generate_filename includes the archive serial number value for {asn} when the document has an ASN set
1.4: Tests that generate_filename produces a fallback value for {asn} when the document has no archive serial number
1.5: Tests that generate_filename resolves {tags[key]} to the value portion of a tag when the tag name uses an underscore as the key-value separator
1.6: Tests that generate_filename resolves {tags[key]} to the value portion of a tag when the tag name uses a dash as the key-value separator
1.7: Tests that generate_filename falls back to a default value for {tags[key]} when tag names do not use a recognized key-value separator
1.8: Tests that generate_filename retrieves a tag by its numeric position when using {tags[N]} with an index within the range of available tags
1.9: Tests that generate_filename falls back to a default value for {tags[N]} when the numeric index exceeds the number of available tags
1.10: Tests that generate_filename includes tag names in the filename when using the {tag_list} placeholder
1.11: Tests that generate_filename strips leading path separators from the format string result so the filename path is relative
1.12: Tests that generate_filename substitutes year, month, and day components when using {created_year}, {created_month}, and {created_day} placeholders
2.1: Places the tests for document type and archive serial number placeholder behavior in the src/documents/tests/ directory
2.2: Places the tests for tag-related placeholder behavior in the src/documents/tests/ directory
2.3: Places the tests for path separator handling and date component placeholders in the src/documents/tests/ directory
3.1: All tests use Django's TestCase framework with self.assert* assertion methods
3.2: All tests follow the test_<descriptive_name> snake_case naming convention
3.3: All tests use the @override_settings decorator to configure PAPERLESS_FILENAME_FORMAT for each test scenario
3.4: All tests create Document model instances via the Django ORM as test inputs
